org.docgene.model

Interface Article

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    XMLParentArticle
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractXMLParentArticle, ArticlesGlossary, OpaqueArticle, XMLArticle, XMLDisambArticle, XMLFallbackArticle, XMLIndex, XMLRawHTMLArticle, XMLRedirect

    public interface Article
extends org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement
    Represents an article interface.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String INDEX
      The ID of the index article.
      static java.lang.String INDEX_LC
      The ID of the index article in lower case.
      static short TYPE_ARTICLE
      The type for a regular article.
      static short TYPE_DISAMB
      The type for a disambiguation article.
      static short TYPE_FALLBACK
      The type for a fallback article.
      static short TYPE_INDEX
      The type for the index article.
      static short TYPE_RAW_HTML
      The type for a raw html article.
      static short TYPE_REDIRECT
      The type for a redirect article.
      static short TYPE_TEMPLATE
      The type for a template article.

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement

        ARTICLE, CATEGORIES, CATEGORY, DICTIONARY, FOOTER, FULL_TEXT_SEARCH, GLOSSARY, HEADER, IMAGE_DEFINITION, IMAGES_DEFINITION, INFOBOX_DEFINITION, INFOBOX_PROPERTY, MENUS, PACKAGE, RESOURCE_DEFINITION, RESOURCES_DEFINITION, UNDEFINED

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      default boolean addAlternateTitle(java.lang.String title, boolean keepCase, boolean inDictionnary)
      Add an alternate title to the article.
      default void addReference(ArticleRef ref)
      Add an article reference.
      default boolean articleNameAlreadyTaken()
      Return true if the article name was already taken, and the article was not added in the model.
      default java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getAlternateTitles()
      Return the article alternate titles.
      default java.util.Map<java.lang.String,AlternateTitle> getAlternateTitlesMap()
      Return the article alternate titles to the raw titles Map.
      XMLParentArticle getArticle()
      Return the XMLArticle which is really accessed through this Article.
      short getArticleType()
      Return the article type.
      java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getCategories()
      Return the categories on which this article belongs.
      java.lang.String getDescription()
      Return the article description.
      default java.lang.String getHeader()
      Construct the header text for the article.
      java.lang.String getHeader(boolean escaping)
      Construct the header text for the article.
      java.lang.String getID()
      Return the article ID.
      default java.util.List<XMLMap> getMaps()
      Return the list of maps in the article.
      default java.lang.String getMeta()
      Return the meta description to be used for the article for the dictionnary or categories.
      default java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getNormalizedAlternateTitles()
      Return the normalized article alternate titles.
      default java.util.List<NoteContent> getNotes()
      Return the notes.
      java.lang.String getPackage()
      Return the article package.
      default ArticleRef getRef()
      Return the article ref.
      java.util.Set<ArticleRef> getReferences()
      Return the references used in the article.
      default short getRootElementType()
      Return the RootElement.ARTICLE type.
      default int getSuffix()
      Return the article name suffix (used for articles which have the name of an already existing article).
      default java.lang.String getTitle()
      Return the article description by default.
      default boolean hasAlternateTitles()
      Return true if the article alternate titles.
      default boolean hasCondition()
      Return true if the article has a condition.
      boolean hasID()
      Return true if the article has a separate ID.
      default boolean hasImageMaps()
      Return true if the article has image maps.
      default boolean hasImages()
      Return true if this article has at least one image.
      default boolean hasMaps()
      Return true if the article has Maps.
      default boolean hasNotes()
      Return true if the article has notes.
      default boolean hasSearchableTitles()
      Return true if the article has searchable titles.
      default boolean hasSuffix()
      Return true if the article has a name suffix (used for articles which have the name of an already existing article).
      default boolean hasTOC()
      Return true if the article should have a Table of content (true by default).
      default boolean isDirect()
      Return true if this article is direct.
      default boolean isDirectXMLArticle()
      Return true if this article is direct and is not a raw html article.
      default boolean isIndex()
      Return true if the article is an index.
      boolean isKeepingCase()
      Return true if the article title should keep the title description case.
      default boolean isRawHTMLArticle()
      Return true if this article represents a raw HTML file.
      default boolean isTemplate()
      Return true if this article is a template.
      default boolean isValid()
      Return true if the article is valid.
      default void setArticleNameAlreadyTaken(boolean articleNameAlreadyTaken)
      Set if the article name was already taken, and the article was not added in the model.
      void setDescription(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String desc, boolean keepCase)
      Set the article description.
      void setID(java.lang.String id)
      Set the article ID.
      default void setImages()
      Set that this article has at least one image.
      void setRoot(org.docgene.model.globals.RootDirectory root)
      Set the root directory.
      default void setSuffix(int suffix)
      Set the article name suffix.

    • Method Detail

      • getArticleType

        short getArticleType()
        Return the article type.
        Returns:
        the article type

      • setArticleNameAlreadyTaken

        default void setArticleNameAlreadyTaken(boolean articleNameAlreadyTaken)
        Set if the article name was already taken, and the article was not added in the model. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        articleNameAlreadyTaken - true if the article name was already taken

      • articleNameAlreadyTaken

        default boolean articleNameAlreadyTaken()
        Return true if the article name was already taken, and the article was not added in the model. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        true if the article name was already taken

      • hasCondition

        default boolean hasCondition()
        Return true if the article has a condition. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        true if the article has a condition

      • getPackage

        java.lang.String getPackage()
        Return the article package.
        Specified by:
        getPackage in interface org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement
        Specified by:
        getPackage in interface org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement
        Returns:
        the article package

      • isKeepingCase

        boolean isKeepingCase()
        Return true if the article title should keep the title description case.
        Returns:
        true if the article title should keep the title description case

      • getHeader

        default java.lang.String getHeader()
        Construct the header text for the article.
        Returns:
        the header text for the article

      • getHeader

        java.lang.String getHeader(boolean escaping)
        Construct the header text for the article.
        Parameters:
        escaping - true if the text must be escaped to html content
        Returns:
        the header text for the article

      • hasID

        boolean hasID()
        Return true if the article has a separate ID.
        Returns:
        true if the article has a separate ID

      • getSuffix

        default int getSuffix()
        Return the article name suffix (used for articles which have the name of an already existing article). Return -1 by default, meaning that the article has no name suffix.
        Returns:
        the article name suffix

      • hasSuffix

        default boolean hasSuffix()
        Return true if the article has a name suffix (used for articles which have the name of an already existing article).
        Returns:
        true if the article has a name suffix

      • setSuffix

        default void setSuffix(int suffix)
        Set the article name suffix. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        suffix - the article name suffix

      • hasTOC

        default boolean hasTOC()
        Return true if the article should have a Table of content (true by default).
        Returns:
        true if the article should have a Table of content

      • setImages

        default void setImages()
        Set that this article has at least one image. Do nothing by default.

      • hasAlternateTitles

        default boolean hasAlternateTitles()
        Return true if the article alternate titles.
        Returns:
        true if the article alternate titles

      • addAlternateTitle

        default boolean addAlternateTitle(java.lang.String title,
                                  boolean keepCase,
                                  boolean inDictionnary)
        Add an alternate title to the article.
        Parameters:
        title - the alternate title
        keepCase - true if the title description should keep the title description case
        inDictionnary - true if the alternate title must be included in the dictionnary and categories
        Returns:
        true if the alternate title can be added

      • getAlternateTitles

        default java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getAlternateTitles()
        Return the article alternate titles. Return an empty Set by default.
        Returns:
        the article alternate titles

      • getAlternateTitlesMap

        default java.util.Map<java.lang.String,AlternateTitle> getAlternateTitlesMap()
        Return the article alternate titles to the raw titles Map. Return an empty Map by default.
        Returns:
        the article alternate titles to the raw titles Map

      • getNormalizedAlternateTitles

        default java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getNormalizedAlternateTitles()
        Return the normalized article alternate titles.
        Returns:
        the normalized article alternate titles

      • hasSearchableTitles

        default boolean hasSearchableTitles()
        Return true if the article has searchable titles. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        true if the article has searchable titles

      • getMaps

        default java.util.List<XMLMap> getMaps()
        Return the list of maps in the article. Return null by default.
        Returns:
        null

      • isRawHTMLArticle

        default boolean isRawHTMLArticle()
        Return true if this article represents a raw HTML file. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        true if this article represents a raw HTML file

      • hasMaps

        default boolean hasMaps()
        Return true if the article has Maps. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        false

      • hasImageMaps

        default boolean hasImageMaps()
        Return true if the article has image maps. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        false

      • hasImages

        default boolean hasImages()
        Return true if this article has at least one image. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        true if this article has at least one image

      • getArticle

        XMLParentArticle getArticle()
        Return the XMLArticle which is really accessed through this Article. It will return itself if isDirect() returns true.
        Returns:
        the XMLArticle

      • getMeta

        default java.lang.String getMeta()
        Return the meta description to be used for the article for the dictionnary or categories.
        Returns:
        the meta description

      • isTemplate

        default boolean isTemplate()
        Return true if this article is a template. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        false

      • isDirect

        default boolean isDirect()
        Return true if this article is direct. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        false

      • isDirectXMLArticle

        default boolean isDirectXMLArticle()
        Return true if this article is direct and is not a raw html article.
        Returns:
        true if this article is direct and is not a raw html article

      • isIndex

        default boolean isIndex()
        Return true if the article is an index. Return false by default.
        Returns:
        false

      • setID

        void setID(java.lang.String id)
        Set the article ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the article id

      • setRoot

        void setRoot(org.docgene.model.globals.RootDirectory root)
        Set the root directory.
        Parameters:
        root - the root

      • setDescription

        void setDescription(java.lang.String id,
                    java.lang.String desc,
                    boolean keepCase)
        Set the article description.
        Parameters:
        id - the article id
        desc - the article description
        keepCase - true if the article description should keep the title description case

      • getDescription

        java.lang.String getDescription()
        Return the article description.

        the article description

        Return the article ref.

        the article ref

        Return the references used in the article.

        the references

      • addReference

        default void addReference(ArticleRef ref)
        Add an article reference. Do nothing by default.
        Parameters:
        ref - the article reference

      • getTitle

        default java.lang.String getTitle()
        Return the article description by default.
        Returns:
        the article description by default

      • getID

        java.lang.String getID()
        Return the article ID.
        Specified by:
        getID in interface org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement
        Returns:
        the article ID

      • getNotes

        default java.util.List<NoteContent> getNotes()
        Return the notes. Return null by default.
        Returns:
        null

      • hasNotes

        default boolean hasNotes()
        Return true if the article has notes.
        Returns:
        true if the article has notes

      • getCategories

        java.util.Set<java.lang.String> getCategories()
        Return the categories on which this article belongs.
        Returns:
        the categories on which this article belongs

      • isValid

        default boolean isValid()
        Return true if the article is valid. Return true by default.
        Returns:
        true.

        default short getRootElementType()
        Return the RootElement.ARTICLE type.
        Specified by:
        getRootElementType in interface org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement

        the element type
